pbi:mashup.document:
section Section1;
shared HR_Dashboard_Lakehouse = let
  Source = Lakehouse.Contents([HierarchicalNavigation = null]),
  Navigation = Source{[workspaceId = "04d28be3-d839-4842-bcde-c63960f1d7c3"]}[Data],
  #"Navigation 1" = Navigation{[lakehouseId = "745e7eaa-2609-4f76-b4ca-09419b9616b3"]}[Data],
  #"Navigation 2" = #"Navigation 1"{[Id = "Files", ItemKind = "Folder"]}[Data],
  #"Navigation 3" = #"Navigation 2"{[Name = "HRDataset_v14.xlsx"]}[Content],
  #"Imported Excel workbook" = Excel.Workbook(#"Navigation 3", null, true),
  #"Navigation 4" = #"Imported Excel workbook"{[Item = "HRDataset_v14", Kind = "Sheet"]}[Data],
  #"Promoted headers" = Table.PromoteHeaders(#"Navigation 4", [PromoteAllScalars = true]),
  #"Changed column type" = Table.TransformColumnTypes(#"Promoted headers", {{"Employee_Name", type text}, {"EmpID", Int64.Type}, {"MarriedID", Int64.Type}, {"MaritalStatusID", Int64.Type}, {"GenderID", Int64.Type}, {"EmpStatusID", Int64.Type}, {"DeptID", Int64.Type}, {"PerfScoreID", Int64.Type}, {"FromDiversityJobFairID", Int64.Type}, {"Salary", Int64.Type}, {"Termd", Int64.Type}, {"PositionID", Int64.Type}, {"Position", type text}, {"State", type text}, {"Zip", Int64.Type}, {"DOB", type date}, {"Gender", type text}, {"MaritalDesc", type text}, {"CitizenDesc", type text}, {"HispanicLatino", type text}, {"RaceDesc", type text}, {"DateofHire", type date}, {"DateofTermination", type date}, {"TermReason", type text}, {"EmploymentStatus", type text}, {"Department", type text}, {"ManagerName", type text}, {"ManagerID", Int64.Type}, {"RecruitmentSource", type text}, {"PerformanceScore", type text}, {"EngagementSurvey", type number}, {"EmpSatisfaction", Int64.Type}, {"SpecialProjectsCount", Int64.Type}, {"LastPerformanceReview_Date", type date}, {"DaysLateLast30", Int64.Type}, {"Absences", Int64.Type}}),
  Custom = Table.AddColumn(#"Changed column type", "Attrition", each if [EmploymentStatus] = "Active" then 1 else 0),
  #"Changed column type 1" = Table.TransformColumnTypes(Custom, {{"Attrition", Int64.Type}}),
  #"Custom 1" = Table.TransformColumnTypes(Table.AddColumn(#"Changed column type 1", "Age", each Date.Year(DateTime.LocalNow()) - Date.Year([DOB])), {{"Age", Int64.Type}}),
  #"Custom 2" = Table.TransformColumnTypes(Table.AddColumn(#"Custom 1", "Age Bracket", each if [Age] >= 18 and [Age] <= 25 then "18-25"
else if [Age] >= 26 and [Age] <= 35 then "26-35"
else if [Age] >= 36 and [Age] <= 45 then "36-45"
else if [Age] >= 46 and [Age] <= 60 then "46-55"
else  "55+"), {{"Age Bracket", type text}})
in
  #"Custom 2";
shared HR_Dashboard_Lakehouse_DataDestination = let
  Pattern = Lakehouse.Contents([CreateNavigationProperties = false, EnableFolding = false, HierarchicalNavigation = null]),
  Navigation_1 = Pattern{[workspaceId = "04d28be3-d839-4842-bcde-c63960f1d7c3"]}[Data],
  Navigation_2 = Navigation_1{[lakehouseId = "745e7eaa-2609-4f76-b4ca-09419b9616b3"]}[Data],
  TableNavigation = Navigation_2{[Id = "HRDataset", ItemKind = "Table"]}?[Data]?,
  Table = NavigationTable.CreateTableOnDemand(TableNavigation, #table(type table[Employee_Name = nullable Text.Type, EmpID = nullable Int64.Type, MarriedID = nullable Int64.Type, MaritalStatusID = nullable Int64.Type, GenderID = nullable Int64.Type, EmpStatusID = nullable Int64.Type, DeptID = nullable Int64.Type, PerfScoreID = nullable Int64.Type, FromDiversityJobFairID = nullable Int64.Type, Salary = nullable Int64.Type, Termd = nullable Int64.Type, PositionID = nullable Int64.Type, Position = nullable Text.Type, State = nullable Text.Type, Zip = nullable Int64.Type, DOB = nullable Date.Type, Gender = nullable Text.Type, MaritalDesc = nullable Text.Type, CitizenDesc = nullable Text.Type, HispanicLatino = nullable Text.Type, RaceDesc = nullable Text.Type, DateofHire = nullable Date.Type, DateofTermination = nullable Date.Type, TermReason = nullable Text.Type, EmploymentStatus = nullable Text.Type, Department = nullable Text.Type, ManagerName = nullable Text.Type, ManagerID = nullable Int64.Type, RecruitmentSource = nullable Text.Type, PerformanceScore = nullable Text.Type, EngagementSurvey = nullable Number.Type, EmpSatisfaction = nullable Int64.Type, SpecialProjectsCount = nullable Int64.Type, LastPerformanceReview_Date = nullable Date.Type, DaysLateLast30 = nullable Int64.Type, Absences = nullable Int64.Type, Attrition = nullable Int64.Type, Age = nullable Int64.Type, #"Age Bracket" = nullable Text.Type], {}), [DeleteWhenEmpty = true])
in
  Table;
shared DefaultStaging = let
  DefaultStaging = Pipeline.DefaultModelStorage()
in
  DefaultStaging;
[Staging = "FastCopyStaging"]
shared HR_Dashboard_Lakehouse_WriteToDataDestination = let
  HR_Dashboard_Lakehouse_WriteToDataDestination = Pipeline.ExecuteAction(ValueAction.WithTransaction([Target = HR_Dashboard_Lakehouse_DataDestination], (txn) => {TableAction.DeleteRows(txn[Target]), () => TableAction.InsertRows(txn[Target], HR_Dashboard_Lakehouse_TransformForWriteToDataDestination), Action.DoNothing}))
in
  HR_Dashboard_Lakehouse_WriteToDataDestination;
shared HR_Dashboard_Lakehouse_TransformForWriteToDataDestination = let
    SourceTable = Table.SelectColumns(HR_Dashboard_Lakehouse, {"Employee_Name", "EmpID", "MarriedID", "MaritalStatusID", "GenderID", "EmpStatusID", "DeptID", "PerfScoreID", "FromDiversityJobFairID", "Salary", "Termd", "PositionID", "Position", "State", "Zip", "DOB", "Gender", "MaritalDesc", "CitizenDesc", "HispanicLatino", "RaceDesc", "DateofHire", "DateofTermination", "TermReason", "EmploymentStatus", "Department", "ManagerName", "ManagerID", "RecruitmentSource", "PerformanceScore", "EngagementSurvey", "EmpSatisfaction", "SpecialProjectsCount", "LastPerformanceReview_Date", "DaysLateLast30", "Absences", "Attrition", "Age", "Age Bracket"})
in
    SourceTable;
shared FastCopyStaging = let
  FastCopyStaging = Pipeline.FastCopyModelStorage(DefaultStaging, [Required = false])
in
  FastCopyStaging;
